name: Fair Employment
description: Campaigns for job postings, recruitment, or employment services. Triggers restrictions on demographic targeting to prevent employment discrimination.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US Title VII / EEOC
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits employment advertising that discriminates based on race, color, religion, sex, or national origin. EEOC enforces.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US ADEA
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Age Discrimination in Employment Act. Prohibits age-based targeting in employment advertising for workers over 40.

guidance: Employment advertising restrictions apply to any company running job ads, not just staffing companies. A tech company posting engineering jobs must comply with EEOC rules. Age targeting is particularly scrutinized — the 2019 Facebook settlement specifically addressed age-restricted job ad targeting.
